SHARDS.Name: Name

SHARDS.Equipment.NoEquipment: No equipment. Browse or drag items here.
SHARDS.Lineage.MaxLineage: An adventurer can only have one lineage.
SHARDS.Target.Label: Target
SHARDS.DamageType.Label: Damage Type
SHARDS.ConditionDesc.poison: Takes poison damage at the start of each turn.
SHARDS.ConditionDesc.burn: Takes fire damage at the start of each turn.
SHARDS.ConditionDesc.freeze: Movement reduced; may skip turn if severe.
SHARDS.ConditionDesc.drench: Increased vulnerability to lightning and ice.
SHARDS.ConditionDesc.silence: Cannot use skills that cost MP.
SHARDS.ConditionDesc.slow: Loses pips at the start of each turn.
SHARDS.ConditionDesc.root: Cannot move but can still act.
SHARDS.ConditionDesc.exhaust: Stat totals reduced; stacks worsen the penalty.
SHARDS.ConditionDesc.downed: At 0 HP; must be revived or uses a death count.
SHARDS.ConditionDesc.haste: Gains extra pips at the start of each turn.
SHARDS.ConditionDesc.regen: Recovers HP at the start of each turn.
SHARDS.ConditionDesc.refresh: Recovers MP at the start of each turn.
SHARDS.ConditionDesc.berserk: Increased physical damage but reduced defense.
SHARDS.ConditionDesc.reflect: Reflects a portion of magical damage back.
SHARDS.ConditionDesc.undying: Survives a lethal hit with 1 HP once.
SHARDS.Roll.Silenced: Cannot use magical skills while Silenced!
SHARDS.Roll.DisplayOnly: No target selected — displaying skill info only.

SHARDS.Contest.Title: Contest Roll
SHARDS.Bonds.DeleteConfirm: Delete the bond with {name}? This cannot be undone.
SHARDS.Bonds.BreakConfirm: Break the bond with {name}? The bond can be restored later.
SHARDS.Bonds.AdvanceConfirm: Advance heart rank with {name} to rank {rank}? This costs {cost} XP.
SHARDS.Bonds.NotEnoughXP: Not enough XP to advance bond. Need {cost}, have {current}.
SHARDS.Bonds.NoLinkedActor: This bond is not linked to an actor.
SHARDS.Bonds.ActorNotFound: The linked actor could not be found.
SHARDS.Bonds.NoBondsHint: Right-click an actor in the sidebar to forge a bond, or use the Add Bond button.

SHARDS.Jobs.NoActiveJob: No active job selected. Choose a job from the roster below.

SHARDS.Job.LimitBreakLocked: Limit Break unlocks at Rank D.
SHARDS.Job.MasteryGrowthIncreaseHint: Permanent growth rate bonuses granted upon mastery.
SHARDS.Job.MasteryLocked: Mastery Bonus is only available at Rank S.

SHARDS.XP.LevelUpConfirm: Level up to Lv. {level}? This will roll growth rates for stat gains.
SHARDS.XP.CannotLevelUp: Cannot level up — not enough XP.
SHARDS.XP.MultiLevelPrompt: You have enough XP for another level up!
SHARDS.XP.NoLevelHistory: No level history yet. Level up to begin recording stat growth.
SHARDS.LevelUp.Title: Level Up
SHARDS.LevelUp.RollPrompt: Roll d100 for each stat. If the roll is at or below your growth rate, that stat gains +1.
SHARDS.LevelUp.FinalizeNote: Clicking Apply will write all changes to the character and post a summary to chat. This cannot be undone.
SHARDS.LevelUp.CannotLevelUpWizard: Cannot level up — not enough XP.

SHARDS.JobBrowser.Title: Mana's Codex — Jobs
SHARDS.JobBrowser.NoJobs: No jobs available. GMs can create new jobs with the Create button above.
SHARDS.JobBrowser.OnlyJobs: Only Job items can be added here.
SHARDS.JobBrowser.JobAlreadyOwned: This character already has this job.
SHARDS.Browser.ItemAlreadyOwned: This character already has that item.

SHARDS.Browser.NotAdventurer: Items can only be added to adventurer characters.

SHARDS.Skill.NoSkills: No skills learned yet. Absorb manacite or earn skills from jobs.
SHARDS.PowerTier.Label: Power Tier
SHARDS.Skill.PierceHint: Ignores target's element resistance (not immunity or absorption)
SHARDS.Skill.FormulaNoActor: Formulas show raw values. Assign to an actor to see computed results.
SHARDS.Skill.AlreadyMaxLevel: This skill is already at maximum level.
SHARDS.Skill.XPCostTooltip: XP cost to reach the next skill level
SHARDS.Skill.UUIDPlaceholder: Drag a compendium skill here or paste UUID
SHARDS.Settings.RequireTargeting.Name: Require Targeting
SHARDS.Settings.RequireTargeting.Hint: When enabled, players and GMs must select a target before activating skills and attacks. When disabled, skills and attacks can be posted to chat without a target.
SHARDS.Settings.SkillDetails.Name: Players Can View Skill Details
SHARDS.Settings.SkillDetails.Hint: When enabled, players can see the Details tab on skill sheets in read-only mode. When disabled, only the Description tab is visible to players.

SHARDS.ManaciteBrowser.Title: Mana's Codex — Manacite

SHARDS.Equipment.OversizedWarning: STR requirement not met — penalties active
SHARDS.EffectCreator.Title: Quick Effect Creator
SHARDS.EffectCreator.TogglePercent: Toggle percentage mode (% of base value)
SHARDS.EffectCreator.ElementHint: Positive = more resistant, Negative = more vulnerable
SHARDS.EffectCreator.MovementModeDesc: Grant this movement mode to the actor.
SHARDS.EffectCreator.FlagsHint: Toggle special abilities on or off.
SHARDS.EffectCreator.MightyGripDesc: Wield two-handed weapons one-handed, freeing the offhand slot.
SHARDS.EffectCreator.UndeadDesc: Healing spells deal damage instead of healing. Regen is unaffected.
SHARDS.ChoiceSet.PlaceholderHint: Use {CHOICE} as a placeholder for the selected value.
SHARDS.ChoiceSet.RenameHint: Rename the item on choice. Use {NAME} for original name, {CHOICE} for selected label.
SHARDS.ChoiceSet.UpdateHint: Set a system field on the item. Use {CHOICE_VALUE} for the selected value.
SHARDS.Grant.UuidHint: Drag item here or paste UUID...
SHARDS.Grant.DropHint: Drag an item from the sidebar or compendium
SHARDS.Grant.PropagateRenameHint: {NAME} = original name, {CHOICE} = chosen label, {CHOICE_VALUE} = chosen value
SHARDS.Grant.PropagateUpdateHint: Sets a field on the granted item. Use {CHOICE_VALUE} for the chosen value.
SHARDS.EffectCreator.CriticalHpDesc: Effects created here auto-activate when HP drops below 25% and deactivate when HP recovers.
SHARDS.EffectCreator.NoEffects: No effects yet — use the controls below to add one.
SHARDS.EffectCreator.ChoiceLinkedNoSets: Add a Choice Set first to use this builder.
SHARDS.Formula.NoContext: No actor context — assign a character or select a token to resolve
SHARDS.Experience.NoSkill: Please select or name a skill.
SHARDS.Experience.ThresholdReached: Threshold reached! Consider granting an experiential skill.
SHARDS.Experience.ExposureNotice: {actor}'s body is adapting to {condition}! ({count}/{threshold} exposures). Consider granting: {skill}.
SHARDS.CharGen.Title: Character Creation
SHARDS.CharGen.SettingHint: Configure starting options, stat distribution rules, and other character creation parameters.
SHARDS.CharGen.Settings.LineageListHint: One lineage per line. Players can also enter a custom lineage.
SHARDS.CharGen.Settings.StatPoolHint: Number of points to distribute beyond the base 10 per stat.
SHARDS.CharGen.Settings.StatCapHint: Maximum value any single stat can reach during creation.
SHARDS.CharGen.Settings.GrowthPoolHint: Total percentage pool to distribute across all stats.
SHARDS.CharGen.Settings.GrowthMinHint: Minimum growth rate percentage for any single stat.
SHARDS.CharGen.Settings.GrowthMaxHint: Maximum growth rate percentage for any single stat.
SHARDS.CharGen.Settings.StartingGoldHint: Gold budget for purchasing equipment during character creation.
SHARDS.CharGen.Identity.Name: Character Name
SHARDS.CharGen.Stats.Hint: Distribute points across your stats. Each stat starts at {base} and can reach a maximum of {cap}.
SHARDS.CharGen.Growth.Hint: Distribute your growth rate pool. Each stat must have between {min}% and {max}%.
SHARDS.CharGen.Job.Hint: Choose your starting job. Browse the Codex or drag a job here.
SHARDS.CharGen.Job.Empty: No job selected. Browse jobs to choose one.
SHARDS.CharGen.Lineage.Hint: Choose a lineage for your character. This defines your body — size, movement, and innate traits.
SHARDS.CharGen.Lineage.Empty: No lineage selected. Browse lineages to choose.
SHARDS.CharGen.Equipment.Hint: Purchase starting equipment within your gold budget.
SHARDS.CharGen.Equipment.Empty: No equipment selected. Browse equipment to shop.
SHARDS.CharGen.Biography.Hint: Describe your character's appearance, personality, and backstory. All fields are optional.
SHARDS.CharGen.Biography.BackstoryPlaceh: Write your character's history and background...
SHARDS.CharGen.Validation.StatsRemaining: You still have {remaining} stat point(s) to distribute.
SHARDS.CharGen.Validation.GrowthRemainin: You still have {remaining}% growth rate to distribute.
SHARDS.CharGen.Validation.LineageRequire: You must select at least one lineage.
SHARDS.CharGen.Validation.JobRequired: You must select a starting job.
SHARDS.CharGen.Validation.OverBudget: Not enough gold! Remove some equipment first.
SHARDS.CharGen.WrongStepLineage: Switch to the Lineage step to add a lineage.
SHARDS.CharGen.WrongStepJob: Switch to the Job step to add a job.
SHARDS.CharGen.WrongStepEquipment: Switch to the Equipment step to add equipment.
SHARDS.CharGen.OverwriteWarning: This character already has existing data. Running the wizard will replace their stats, growth rates, job, traits, and equipment. Are you sure?

SHARDS.Encounter.SuggestionDeadly: Deadly encounter: {count} monsters at Rank {rank}, plus 1 boss at Rank {bossRank}.

SHARDS.Encounter.AddToCombatPrompt: Add the created monsters to the active combat tracker?

SHARDS.EffectItem.NoEffects: This effect item has no Active Effects to apply.
SHARDS.PartyHud.Title: Party
SHARDS.PartyHud.NoMembers: No party members. Add members to the party sheet.
SHARDS.PartyHud.NoParty: No party actor found. Create a Party actor first.
SHARDS.PartyHud.NoTokenOnScene: No token for this character on the current scene.
SHARDS.Settings.PartyHud.EnabledHint: Show a floating party status overlay on screen. Requires page reload to take effect.
SHARDS.Settings.PartyHud.VisibleHint: Toggle your personal Party HUD visibility. Requires page reload to take effect.
SHARDS.Settings.PartyHud.ModeHint: Choose how much detail the Party HUD shows.
SHARDS.EnemyHud.Title: Enemies
SHARDS.Settings.EnemyHud.EnabledHint: Show a floating enemy status overlay during combat.
SHARDS.Settings.EnemyHud.VisibleHint: Toggle your personal Enemy HUD visibility.
SHARDS.Settings.EnemyHud.ModeHint: Choose how much detail the Enemy HUD shows.
SHARDS.Settings.EnemyHud.RevealTierHint: How much enemy information is visible to players. GM always sees everything.
SHARDS.Settings.TokenHud.EnabledHint: Show a floating info panel near tokens on hover or selection.
SHARDS.Settings.TokenHud.HoverDelayHint: Delay in milliseconds before showing the Token HUD on hover. Set to 0 for instant.
SHARDS.Settings.TokenBars.Name: Shards Token Display
SHARDS.Settings.TokenBars.Hint: Replace default token resource bars with Log Horizon-style HP/MP bars and force monster name visibility for all players.
SHARDS.Settings.Elevation.MarkersHint: Display a badge on tokens with non-zero elevation showing their altitude.
SHARDS.Settings.Elevation.StepHint: How much elevation changes per key press (PageUp/PageDown).
SHARDS.Elevation.Label: Elevation
SHARDS.Keybindings.ElevationUpHint: Increase the elevation of selected tokens by the configured step.
SHARDS.Keybindings.ElevationDownHint: Decrease the elevation of selected tokens by the configured step.
SHARDS.Keybindings.ElevationResetHint: Reset the elevation of selected tokens to 0 (land).
SHARDS.Monster.NoSkills: No skills. Add skills or drag skill items onto this monster.
SHARDS.Monster.SkillsDragHint: Drag skill items from the sidebar or Skill Browser onto this sheet to add abilities.
